results.title: Buzzy AI Review: Features, Pricing, Pros, Cons, and Best Uses
results.content:
Let’s be completely real for a second: Buzzy is a powerhouse for creating mind-bending AI visual shifts, but it isn’t a complete, standalone video editor. No timeline to trim it. No audio controls to add music. No caption layer for accessibility. No way to arrange multiple clips into a coherent video. You get a great-looking asset and then... you're on your own.

That is exactly why pairing Buzzy with a traditional, robust editor like Wondershare Filmora changes the entire game. This AI video editor got a full creative timeline, built-in AI generation, auto captions, audio tools, and platform-ready export.

Try It Free Try It Free

qrcode-img

Scan to get the Filmora App

Install free Filmora App Install free Filmora App

secure-icon Secure Download

### What Filmora Fills In After Buzzy [...] ### The Buzzy-to-Filmora Workflow

Basically, you can think of Buzzy AI as the creative generator and Filmora as the finishing table. Buzzy helps you create or fix the raw AI clip. Filmora helps you trim it, pace it, add sound, add captions, polish the color, and export it properly.

Here's exactly how the two tools work together in practice: [...] Buzzy Now is a browser-based AI visual editor that manipulates video elements through conversational text prompts, but it must be paired with a comprehensive timeline editor like Wondershare Filmora to add audio, captions, and finalize 4K exports.  
    ● It utilizes models like Seedance 2.0 and Kling AI to execute targeted local edits such as background changes, camera movements, or human face swaps without requiring a full clip regeneration.  
    ● After exhausting the 50 free trial credits, users must purchase subscriptions ranging from $19 to $199 per month, though the interface complicates budget tracking by not always displaying the exact credit cost prior to generation.

results.content:
# Buzzy AI Makes Editing Faster Than Filming with Seedance 2.5
## Get365AI
570000 subscribers

### Description
1842 views
Posted: 22 Jul 2026
🚀 Get 50 free credits when you sign up here: 

Seedance 2.5 support is coming soon to Buzzy, expanding the platform’s AI video generation and creative workflow capabilities.

Buzzy is an AI video editor that helps creators edit videos with simple prompts instead of complicated timelines, keyframes, masking, tracking, and manual editing workflows.

Most people still think video editing means learning Premiere Pro, After Effects, masking, tracking, timelines, keyframes, and complicated editing workflows. But Buzzy changes that by letting you describe the edit you want and apply it directly to the video. [...] Most people still think editing video means learning complicated software like Premiere Pro, After Effects, masking, tracking, timelines, key frames, all of that. But Buzzy just changed the workflow completely because instead of editing videos manually, you literally talk to them. You type one sentence like, "Remove the people in the background." or "Make this look cinematic." and the AI edits only that exact part of the video. No re-shooting, no advanced editing skills, no spending hours learning software. And honestly, once you see what this thing can do, normal editing starts feeling ancient. Hey there, if you're serious about how AI can actually make your life easier, you're in the right place. This tool turns powerful AI ideas into something practical, simple, and genuinely useful. [...] 🚀 What You'll Learn
✅ Buzzy AI Video Editor
✅ Prompt-Based Video Editing
✅ AI Video Editing Workflow
✅ Cinematic Lighting With AI
✅ Background Object Removal
✅ Outfit Replacement
✅ Object Replacement
✅ Horizontal to Vertical Reframing
✅ AI Scene Transformation
✅ Upcoming Seedance 2.5 Support

Buzzy makes video editing feel less like using technical software and more like collaborating with an AI editor. Instead of learning complicated tools, creators can describe the result they want and refine their footage step by step.

Whether you're creating TikToks, Reels, YouTube Shorts, music videos, ads, travel content, podcasts, or product videos, Buzzy can help speed up editing and make advanced creative effects more accessible.

results.title: Buzzy Unveils the World's First AI Video Photoshop ...
results.content:
Buzzy is available now at .

About Creati Gen AI Inc.

Creati Gen AI Inc. ("Creati") is an AI-powered creative tools company on a mission to help everyone express themselves better through technology. The company's flagship product, Creati Studio, serves over 20 million users globally. Its newest product, Buzzy, redefines video editing through conversational AI. Learn more at .

About Buzzy

Buzzy is Creati AI Inc.'s conversational video-editing tool that acts as a "Vibe Video Photoshop," enabling creators to fix, refine, and perfect video content with simple text commands. Learn more at .

Media Assets:

A press kit including product demos, GIFs, and screenshots is available at Buzzy\_PR\_Media\_Kit [...] Developed for the speed and agility content marketers and creators require, Buzzy helps teams fix video flaws at scale with high efficiency. For many creators, a nearly perfect video is often discarded because of a single mistake, such as an incorrect line of dialogue, an unwanted background detail, or a minor visual flaw.  Fixing these issues typically requires time-consuming tools, technical skills, or a full restart of the production process. Now with Buzzy, content creators can salvage AI-generated clips that would otherwise be discarded due to minor imperfections. [...] "I throw away 95% of my AI-generated videos every day because of a single small blemish," said Ella Zhang, founder of Buzzy. "We are stuck in repeatedly re-prompting workflows, when what creators really need is the ability to fix what's already almost perfect."

This shift enables a new creative workflow: generate first, then refine. Instead of repeatedly regenerating content, creators can now iterate on existing content until it reaches the desired result, saving both time and production costs.

Buzzy is developed by Creati, the team behind Creati Studio, which has grown to over 20 million users and reached $15 million in annual recurring revenue within its first year.

results.title: Buzzy Launches AI Video Editing Platform With $20M Funding Led ...
results.content:
Buzzy was developed by Creati, the company behind Creati Studio, which the company says has grown to more than 20 million users and reached $15 million in annual recurring revenue within its first year. Creati Studio serves as the company’s broader creative suite, while Buzzy is its focused entry into AI-driven video editing.

The new product reflects a broader shift in generative AI tools toward post-generation editing, where users refine existing outputs rather than generating entirely new assets each time. This approach is increasingly being explored across creative software categories as AI-generated content becomes more common but still requires human adjustment to meet production standards. [...] Buzzy is positioned as a text-driven video editing system that allows users to modify existing video content through natural language prompts. Instead of traditional editing timelines or manual post-production tools, users can request changes such as removing background elements, adjusting lighting, correcting framing issues, or modifying on-screen messaging. The company says the system applies edits at a pixel level while preserving the rest of the footage.
